title: Copilot FinOps cost center member sync (v1)
description: Schema for config/cost-center-members*.yml. Validates structure, types, and enums only. Cross-field semantic rules (e.g. a mapping needs source.org or source.enterprise, batch_size clamping, and anything needing live GitHub data) are enforced by scripts/validate-config.sh and the sync script, not here.

version.description: Config contract version. Optional; defaults to 1 when omitted. Each version has a frozen schema under schemas/v<N>/, so v1 configs keep validating against this file even after the contract evolves.

enterprise_slug.description: GitHub Enterprise slug. Optional here; may instead be passed via --enterprise-slug or the workflow input.

api.description: Advanced REST endpoint overrides. Leave unset for github.com; only set when proxying the GitHub API. Not shown in example configs by convention.

mappings.description: List of team -> cost center membership mappings. May be empty for a safe no-op config.

name.description: Local label used in logs and the --mapping-name filter.

source.description: Team source. Provide team_slug plus exactly one of org or enterprise (the org/enterprise choice is enforced by validate-config.sh).

org.description: Organization login for an org team source.

enterprise.description: Enterprise slug for an enterprise team source.

target.description: Cost center to sync the team's members into.

cost_center.description: Cost center name (resolved to its ID at sync time).

remove_extra_members.description: Remove cost center users who are no longer in the team. Optional; defaults to false (additive sync).

batch_size.description: Members added/removed per API call. Optional; defaults to 50. Must be 1-50.
